issues.title: Signal handlers use .delay() but no Celery installed
issues.attack: Signal code calls .delay() which requires Celery. Project has no Celery installed.
issues.response: Replace all .delay() with synchronous service calls that create AutoAction(status=pending) only.

issues.title: Missing context save endpoint in URL design
issues.attack: URL table has no POST endpoint for saving draft_data. JS autosave has no target.
issues.response: Add POST /projects/<pk>/context/save/ endpoint.

issues.title: beforeunload + HTMX POST unreliable for autosave
issues.attack: Browsers cancel async requests during beforeunload. HTMX uses XHR which may be terminated.
issues.response: Three-tier autosave: periodic debounce (primary) + sendBeacon (unload fallback) + HTMX event (in-app nav).

issues.title: Contact/Interview result values use Korean but signals check English
issues.attack: Signal checks 'interested'/'pass' but model values are '관심'/'합격'.
issues.response: Use enum constants Contact.Result.INTERESTED, Interview.Result.PASSED, ProjectStatus.NEW.

issues.title: Resume logic undefined — no form restoration mechanism
issues.attack: draft_data.form string provides no mapping to URL, view, form class, or HTMX partial.
issues.response: Define FORM_REGISTRY mapping form names to URL names, kwargs, and templates. Resume via HX-Redirect with ?resume=<context_id>.

issues.title: ProjectContext collision — multiple sources overwrite each other
issues.attack: No uniqueness constraint, multiple autosave sources can pile up or overwrite.
issues.response: Add UniqueConstraint(project, consultant) + update_or_create. Single-active-context is intentional for v1.

issues.title: Time-delayed triggers have no execution mechanism
issues.attack: 3-day followup and 1-day lock expiry have no cron/command/scheduler.
issues.response: Add due_at field to AutoAction. Add check_due_actions management command for cron.

issues.title: Synchronous AI calls in post_save signals block HTTP
issues.attack: Gemini API with retries inside signal handler blocks user for 10+ seconds.
issues.response: Signals create AutoAction(status=pending) only. AI generation deferred to user demand or management command.

issues.title: No permission/authorization rules
issues.attack: No access control on context or auto-action endpoints.
issues.response: Add organization + consultant matching on all views.

issues.title: AutoAction missing owner/audit fields
issues.attack: No created_by, applied_by, dismissed_by for multi-consultant accountability.
issues.response: Add created_by, applied_by, dismissed_by FK fields.

issues.title: No JSON schema validation for draft_data and AutoAction.data
issues.attack: PII in unvalidated JSON. No schema per action type.
issues.response: Define expected keys per type in constants dict. Simple Python validation, no jsonschema library.

issues.title: Signal duplicate firing on every save
issues.attack: post_save fires on every .save(), not just state transitions.
issues.response: Check for existing pending AutoAction before creating. Idempotent creation.

issues.title: Project status check uses string 'new'
issues.attack: Hardcoded string instead of enum constant reference.
issues.response: Use ProjectStatus.NEW enum reference. Value matches but style is wrong.

issues.title: AutoAction doesn't use BaseModel (missing updated_at)
issues.attack: Manually defined fields instead of extending BaseModel like all other models.
issues.response: AutoAction extends BaseModel. Remove manual id/created_at.

issues.title: Apply not atomic — no transaction safety
issues.attack: No transaction.atomic() or select_for_update(). Concurrent double-apply possible.
issues.response: Apply uses transaction.atomic() + select_for_update(). Status precondition: only pending can be applied.

issues.title: Apply semantics undefined per action type
issues.attack: No specification of what 'apply' does for each of 6 action types.
issues.response: Define apply semantics table: data schema, target model, mutation behavior per type.

issues.title: Voice resume integration points undefined
issues.attack: No specification of which P14 service reads/writes ProjectContext.
issues.response: Define integration points (context_resolver, intent_parser, action_executor). Mark as P14 integration point.

issues.title: Test criteria missing negative/edge cases
issues.attack: Only happy-path tests. No permission, duplicate, concurrent, AI failure tests.
issues.response: Add negative test criteria: 403, duplicate idempotency, concurrent apply 409, AI failure, invalid data.

issues.title: Artifact list incomplete
issues.attack: Only 2 URL patterns listed but 6+ endpoints exist.
issues.response: List all endpoints in artifacts.

issues.title: No cleanup strategy for stale AutoActions
issues.attack: No TTL or cleanup for old dismissed/applied actions.
issues.response: Filter to pending by default. Use updated_at for audit. No separate cleanup for v1.

issues.title: Project fixture triggers signals, polluting tests
issues.attack: conftest project with NEW status creates 2 AutoActions via signal after Task 5.
issues.response: Change fixture to SEARCHING status. Add separate new_project fixture.

issues.title: apply_action only flips status, no per-type mutations
issues.attack: No type-specific dispatch. Apply is a no-op for all action types.
issues.response: Add type-specific dispatch handlers inside apply_action.

issues.title: Resume doesn't pre-fill target forms
issues.attack: HX-Redirect works but target views don't read ?resume= param.
issues.response: Modify contact_create to detect ?resume= and pre-fill form initial.

issues.title: JS not loaded, forms not annotated
issues.attack: Script exists but never included, no data-autosave attributes on forms.
issues.response: Include JS in template, annotate forms with data-autosave.

issues.title: sendBeacon CSRF failure
issues.attack: sendBeacon cannot set X-CSRFToken header. Requests will be 403.
issues.response: Use fetch({keepalive:true}) instead of sendBeacon.

issues.title: Signal idempotency scoped to pending only
issues.attack: After dismiss/apply, re-save creates new pending action.
issues.response: Remove status from idempotency check.

issues.title: UniqueConstraint migration needs dedup
issues.attack: Migration fails if duplicate contexts exist in DB.
issues.response: Add RunPython dedup migration.

issues.title: Due actions stay pending forever
issues.attack: Management command creates notifications but never marks actions applied.
issues.response: Mark actions applied after notification creation.

issues.title: Missing negative/edge case tests
issues.attack: No resume prefill, cross-org, concurrent, form-encoded tests.
issues.response: Add comprehensive negative test cases.
